user.title: Set up Fronius System
user.description: Please provide the Fronius host and required Web API password. The Web API username is fixed to customer. Optionally restrict auto-enabled Modbus to this Home Assistant host IP.

reconfigure.title: Review Fronius System
reconfigure.description: Review and save the Fronius host and required Web API password for this migrated entry. The Web API username is fixed to customer. Optionally restrict auto-enabled Modbus to this Home Assistant host IP.

error.unsupported_hardware: Unsupported hardware found. See error log for details.
error.scan_interval_too_short: Scan interval is too short. Minimum 5 seconds.
error.invalid_api_credentials: Web API login failed. Check the username and password.
error.cannot_resolve_local_ip: Could not determine this Home Assistant host IP for Modbus restriction.

legacy_modbus_only_entry_reconfigure.title: Review migrated Fronius configuration
legacy_modbus_only_entry_reconfigure.description: The Fronius entry "{entry_title}" was created with an older version of this integration or is missing the required Web API password. It will keep working temporarily, but the configuration model has changed. Open the integration menu and select Reconfigure to review and save the current host and required Web API password.

init.title: Set up Fronius System
init.description: Set the Fronius host and required Web API password. The Web API username is fixed to customer. Optionally restrict auto-enabled Modbus to this Home Assistant host IP.

error.unsupported_hardware: Unsupported hardware found. See error log for details.
error.scan_interval_too_short: Scan interval is too short. Minimum 5 seconds.
error.invalid_api_credentials: Web API login failed. Check the username and password.
error.cannot_resolve_local_ip: Could not determine this Home Assistant host IP for Modbus restriction.
